note: Implementation status of planned API v2 capabilities versus current live edge function support.

features.notes: The v2 client foundation exists in src/api/v2, but no scena-api router is deployed yet.
Access to current active Team is planned for the v2 router via manager JWT.
Live kiosk onboarding exists through separate edge functions with device-token and pairing-code flows.
Kiosk polling is implemented as a standalone gateway endpoint that resolves display state on every poll.
Managers can rotate display credentials in live edge function code.
Presentation upload and processing callbacks are live, with direct LXC integration.
Workflow automation execution is live via a trusted worker endpoint.
Stripe Checkout session creation is implemented in a live edge function.
Billing portal session creation is implemented in a live edge function.
Stripe events are ingested, deduplicated, and used to sync subscription state.
Both live functions and planned v2 use the same stable error code catalog.
Idempotency client headers are supported in src/api/v2, but no server-side store exists for live v2 endpoints yet.
Realtime broadcast invalidation is a live implementation detail used by kiosk polling.
